name: Sheev
description: Built for close combat, the Sheev's plasma blade slices through flesh and armor with equal ease.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Built for close combat, the Sheev's plasma blade slices through flesh and armor with equal ease.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.9
patchlogs.changes:
Sheev Blueprint 
Sheev Blade
Sheev Hilt 
Sheev Heatsink

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.9
patchlogs.changes: Fixed broken enemy behavior when Thrax enemies are disarmed by abilities, which also led them to run around with just a Sheev (fear the butter knife).

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with several one-handed Melee weapons not functioning (as an accidental result of the Glaive changes). Weapons included: most Machetes, Plasma Sword, Destreza and Destreza Prime, Sheev, and Scoliac.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Prova series, Kreska, Sheev, Machete series, Mire, Scoliac, Kama, Nami Solo, Plasma Sword and Destreza series not consuming Combo Counter on Heavy Attack.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.8 + 21.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing Sheev and Dual Heat Sword Rivens.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sheev, Mire, and Hate having unintentionally reduced Attack Speeds.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.6.3
patchlogs.changes: The Sheev is now a Grineer Invasion offering!

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.changes: •    Grineer enemies that become disarmed will now use a Sheev to seek revenge on you, and Corpus will use the Prova.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.12.2
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed not being able to trade the Dera Vandal Blueprint, Karak Wraith Blueprint, Strun Wraith Blueprint, Snipetron Vandal Blueprint/Barrel and Sheev Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.changes: The Ceramic Dagger, Dark Dagger, Heat Dagger, Karyst and Sheev can now be used in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with elemental visual effects on the Sheev.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.7.3 + 14.7.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Increased attack speed of Sheev. To be continued, looks to have just been slide speed.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.7.0: Operation Gate Crash!
patchlogs.fixes: 15 Exposure points: Sheev Dagger: Built for close combat, the Sheev's plasma blade slices through flesh and armor with equal ease.
